verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let us grow, let us grow, let us grow into his truth Let us grow, led by love, let us be led by love to the truth And in everything grow to Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And in everything grow to Christ And in everything grow to Christ who is the head And in everything grow to Christ who is the head of the body The head of the body He is the head of the body The head of the body JESUS
